description_long: This is a rectangular, open-topped picnic basket with a sturdy wooden frame along the top and bottom edges, providing structural support and a touch of rustic charm. The body of the basket is crafted from tightly woven natural wicker, giving it a classic, textured appearance. Integrated into the shorter sides are rectangular cut-out handles, reinforced with additional wicker weaving for comfortable carrying. The basket's interior is spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding food, utensils, or other picnic essentials. The weave pattern is consistent and uniform, with no visible decorative embellishments or lining. The overall look is functional, durable, and well-suited for outdoor or urban leisure activities.
description: A rectangular wicker picnic basket with a wooden frame and integrated cut-out handles, featuring a tight, uniform weave and an open top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide side of the basket with a prominent wooden frame and woven wicker surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rectangular cut-out handle and the depth of the basket's interior.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, displaying the wide woven wicker panel and wooden frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another cut-out handle, mirroring the handle on the other short side.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed rectangular cut-out handles integrated into the short sides, reinforced with woven wicker.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight, and uniform wicker weave with horizontal and vertical alignment.
